'''Katraasii''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

==History==
It was the site of a [[Retreat at Katraasii|battle]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Jai'galaar (clone)|Jai'galaar]] embarrassed himself during the retreat from Katraasii, and was demoted to [[Captain/Legends|captain]] for his actions.<ref name="Insider">{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}}</ref>

After the fall of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Katraasii was still held by the [[Imperial Remnant]] for several years. However, by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]] it was a member [[Planet/Legends|world]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]]. During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], representatives from Katraasii condemned the raids on [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian citizens]] by the [[Galactic Alliance Guard]].

It hosted at least one [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]], also called [[Katraasii Spaceport|Katraasii]].

{{Planet-stub}}
